title: Minecolonies Show Your Job
description: Makes an Item and a Text Hover over the Citizens, showing their Job :) No guessing anymore!
body:
**Minecolonies Show Your Job Datapack**

Makes an Item and a Text Hover over the Citizens, showing their Job :) No guessing anymore!

Ever wondered why there is no Profession in the Citizens Nametags? Me too, so I fixed it.
Now you see which Profession a Citizen has, and an Item indicating it

![Item that shows the Builders Profession](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0381630078a0a11e28c789ea6a54292f1a4ba3fc_0.webp)

**Features:**
- Citizens Show an Icon above them
- Citizens Show a Text naming their Job
- The Item hovers cool above the NPCs lol
- Rename the Professions and change their Icons as you wish, just edit the config_name file, and replace it (data>hover>functions>config_name.mcfunction)
**
Planned Features:**
- Enable/Disable Name Display
- Enable/Disable Icon Display
- Enable/Disable Unemployed State
- Fix Crafter(Stonemason) not working
- Fix children having Unemployed State
- Add the Displays for the Huts too, even harder to tell what the Houses are for

Thanks for downloading, enjoy :)
